breaks.scene_hint: Act 1 wraps up — backstory and character introductions are settling; a quieter emotional beat before the story accelerates
Mid-Act 2 transition — a lull between confrontations; likely a reflective or travel/montage sequence
A brief pause before the final act ramps up — possibly a dialogue-heavy moment or a scene-setting interlude

conservative_breaks.scene_hint: End of Act 1 — the setup has concluded; story momentum temporarily eases before the revenge arc intensifies
Mid-film transition — action plateaus briefly; likely a slower-paced connective scene between two major sequences

relaxed_breaks.scene_hint: Late Act 1 — introductory exposition is winding down; a relatively calm character or setting moment
Act 1 close — backstory fully established; a natural breathing point before the central conflict escalates
Mid-Act 2 — a transitional lull, possibly a montage or travel sequence linking two dramatic beats
Pre-climax interlude — a brief slower scene before the film's final confrontation begins building
